Hero.subtitle: Join thousands of entrepreneurs who have scaled their businesses with our proven strategies and world-class mentoring.

online.title: 100% Online
online.desc: Connect from anywhere and leverage digital resources, discussion spaces, and highly dynamic live classes.

time.title: At Your Own Pace
time.desc: Flexible programs ranging from 4 to 20 hours, designed to fit your schedule perfectly.

practical.title: 100% Applicable Training
practical.desc: Forget boring theory; learn through real-world examples, case studies, and practical exercises.

resources.title: Takeaway Resources
resources.desc: Get downloadable guides, templates, and tools ready to apply in your daily workflow.

growth.title: Holistic Growth
growth.desc: We boost your technical knowledge alongside your leadership, communication, and team coordination skills.

values.title: Purpose and Values
values.desc: We merge ancestral wisdom with business to cultivate conscious leadership with human sense and community vision.

strategic.a: Master the key pillars of modern success: business, marketing, finance, innovation, and human talent.

skills.a: Develop the soft skills that make a difference, such as leadership, assertive communication, teamwork, and adaptability.

boost.a: Accelerate your career growth and generate a positive, visible impact in your company or startup from day one.

flexible.a: Advance at your own pace with constant backing from tutoring, personalized mentoring, and group consulting.

holistic.a: Yes! We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. If you are not satisfied with your experience, simply contact us within 30 days for a full refund, no questions asked.

estrategias-intermedio.title: Diploma in Business Strategies – Intermediate Level
estrategias-intermedio.target: Business owners looking to deepen their business strategies without the need for certification.
estrategias-intermedio.includes: Market analysis, competitive strategy development, and project management.
estrategias-intermedio.modality: Online with access to multimedia materials and discussion forums.
estrategias-intermedio.duration: 20 hours which can be divided into up to 4 days.

cambio-organizacional.title: Organizational Change Management Course
cambio-organizacional.target: Leaders and managers looking to implement effective changes in their organization.
cambio-organizacional.includes: Change models, resistance to change, and transformation process management.
cambio-organizacional.modality: Online with case studies and practical exercises.

equipos-multidisciplinarios.title: Multidisciplinary Team Management Workshop
equipos-multidisciplinarios.target: Work teams collaborating on multidisciplinary projects.
equipos-multidisciplinarios.includes: Group dynamics, conflict management, and teamwork.

estrategias-basico.title: Business Strategies Course Basic Module
estrategias-basico.target: Entrepreneurs and small businesses looking for a solid foundation in business strategies.
estrategias-basico.includes: Introduction to strategic planning, SWOT analysis, and business decision making.
estrategias-basico.modality: 100% online, access to videos and downloadable materials.

marketing-digital.title: Digital Marketing for Business Course
marketing-digital.target: Small businesses wanting to improve their online presence with no prior knowledge.
marketing-digital.includes: Digital marketing fundamentals, social media usage, and basic SEO tools.
marketing-digital.modality: Online with access to discussion forums.

recursos-humanos.title: Human Resources Management Course – Basic Level
recursos-humanos.target: Companies looking to optimize their HR processes without the need for certification.
recursos-humanos.includes: Introduction to talent management, recruitment processes, and selection.
recursos-humanos.modality: 100% online, with reading materials and practical exercises.

comunicacion-efectiva.title: Effective Communication in Work Teams Workshop
comunicacion-efectiva.target: Work teams wanting to improve their internal communication.
comunicacion-efectiva.includes: Assertive communication techniques, active listening, and conflict resolution.

liderazgo-mandos-medios.title: Leadership Course for Middle Management
liderazgo-mandos-medios.target: Supervisors and area managers looking to develop leadership skills.
liderazgo-mandos-medios.includes: Leadership styles, team motivation, and decision making.
liderazgo-mandos-medios.modality: Online with access to webinars and complementary materials.

finanzas-no-financieros.title: Finance Course for Non-Financials
finanzas-no-financieros.target: Entrepreneurs and managers wanting to understand the financial aspects of their business.
finanzas-no-financieros.includes: Basic finance concepts, reading financial statements, and financial decision making.
finanzas-no-financieros.modality: 100% online, with practical exercises and case studies.

About.title: Building the
About.desc: Adven Za was founded with a single mission: to democratize business education and empower entrepreneurs around the world. Our expert mentors have built and scaled businesses worth over $500 million.

curriculum.title: Comprehensive Curriculum

access.title: Lifetime Access
access.desc: Once enrolled, access your courses and updates forever.

mini-tutoria.notes: Ideal for quick consultations or specific doubts
